# Pull Request Summary

## What changed?

Describe the change in simple terms.

## Why was this change needed?

Explain the reason for the change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] DevOps
- [ ] Refactor

## Testing done

- [ ] Backend tested locally
- [ ] Frontend tested locally
- [ ] Health endpoint checked
- [ ] Readiness endpoint checked
- [ ] No real env files committed

## Deployment notes

Mention anything needed for dev, qa, staging, or prod.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code is clear
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Env example files updated if config changed
- [ ] README updated if behavior changed
